title: Americans Have Become Less Confident in Trump’s Decision-Making on Ukraine
summary_en: Republicans and Democrats still have differing views of the war in Ukraine, though their opinions of Russia and Putin are broadly negative.
title_cn: [待翻译] Americans Have Become Less Confident in Trump’s Decision-Making on Ukraine

title: Catholicism has lost people to religious switching in many countries, while Protestantism has gained in some
categories: Pew Templeton Global Religious Futures Project
summary_en: Within Christianity, religious switching has affected the two largest subgroups, Catholicism and Protestantism, differently.
title_cn: [待翻译] Catholicism has lost people to religious switching in many countries, while Protestantism has gained in some

title: Key facts about Native Hawaiians and Pacific Islanders in the U.S.
summary_en: About 1.7 million people in the U.S. are Native Hawaiian or Pacific Islander (NHPI), tracing their roots to Hawaii, Guam, Samoa or other Pacific Islands in Oceania.
title_cn: [待翻译] Key facts about Native Hawaiians and Pacific Islanders in the U.S.

title: 5 facts about U.S. children living in blended families
summary_en: 17% of U.S. children under 18 live in a blended family most or all of the time – one that includes a stepparent, stepsiblings or half siblings.
title_cn: [待翻译] 5 facts about U.S. children living in blended families
